{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01LDKgEnWzMk9QPuzfYbaGeK","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Now I see the issues:\n\n1. In `unknown.go` at line 41, it calls `renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts)`. But if `renderer.before.Renderer` is nil (when before is null), this will cause a nil pointer dereference. The problem is that the code assumes if the action is not `plans.Create`, then there must be a before state, but that's not always true.\n\n2. In `block.go`, lines 161, 173, and 182 all have:\n   ```go\n   renderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n   ```\n   This hardcodes `plans.Create` but should pass through the actual `diff.Action` from the Update action.\n\nLet me look at the test files to understand what the expected behavior is:","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":13,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3747,"cache_read_input_tokens":23150,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3747},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0551569f-9560-46f1-85ce-26a782e21398","uuid":"d7de4c09-4546-4d4d-b9da-b88d5284b048"}

:= range importantAttributes {\n\t\tif attribute == attr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc Block(attributes map[string]computed.Diff, blocks Blocks) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &blockRenderer{\n\t\tattributes: attributes,\n\t\tblocks:     blocks,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype blockRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tattributes map[string]computed.Diff\n\tblocks     Blocks\n}\n\nfunc (renderer blockRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif len(renderer.attributes) == 0 && len(renderer.blocks.GetAllKeys()) == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"{}%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tunchangedAttributes := 0\n\tunchangedBlocks := 0\n\n\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen := 0\n\tvar attributeKeys EnsureValidAttributeName(key)\n\t\tescapedAttributeKeys[key] = escapedKey\n\t\tif maximumAttributeKeyLen < len(escapedKey) {\n\t\t\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen = len(escapedKey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tsort.Strings(attributeKeys)\n\n\timportantAttributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\timportantAttributeOpts.ShowUnchangedChildren = true\n\n\tattributeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tbuf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"{%s\\n\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts)))\n\tfor _, key := range attributeKeys {\n\t\tattribute := addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\tName: \"previous\",\n\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance)\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]testCase{\n\t\t\"moved and updated\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"boop\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  # (moved from test_instance.previous)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ bar = \"baz\" -> \"boop\"\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"moved without changes\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.previous has moved to test_instance.example\n    resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\ntype testCase struct {\n\tAction               plans.Action\n\tActionReason         plans.ResourceInstanceChangeActionReason\n\tModuleInst           addrs.ModuleInstance\n\tMode                 addrs.ResourceMode\n\tInstanceKey          addrs.InstanceKey\n\tDeposedKey           states.DeposedKey\n\tBefore               cty.Value\n\tBeforeSensitivePaths []cty.Path\n\tAfter                cty.Value\n\tAfterSensitivePaths  []cty.Path\n\tSchema               *configschema.Block\n\tRequiredReplace      cty.PathSet\n\tExpectedOutput       string\n\tPrevRunAddr          addrs.AbsResourceInstance\n}\n\nfunc runTestCases(t *testing.T, testCases map[string]testCase) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tty := tc.Schema.ImpliedType()\n\n\t\t\tbeforeVal := tc.Before\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase beforeVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !beforeVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterVal := tc.After\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase afterVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !afterVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\taddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\tMode: tc.Mode,\n\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"example\",\n\t\t\t}.Instance(tc.InstanceKey).Absolute(tc.ModuleInst)\n\n\t\t\tprevRunAddr := tc.PrevRunAddr\n\t\t\t// If no previous run address is given, reuse the current address\n\t\t\t// to make initialization easier\n\t\t\tif prevRunAddr.Resource.Resource.Type == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tprevRunAddr = addr\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tbeforeDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(beforeVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic before value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(afterVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic after value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsrc := &plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\tChangeSrc: plans.ChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:               tc.Action,\n\t\t\t\t\tBefore:               beforeDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: tc.BeforeSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfter:                afterDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths:  tc.AfterSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\n\t\t\t\tAddr:        addr,\n\t\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\t\tDeposedKey:  tc.DeposedKey,\n\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tProvider: addrs.NewDefaultProvider(\"test\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tModule:   addrs.RootModule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tActionReason:    tc.ActionReason,\n\t\t\t\tRequiredReplace: tc.RequiredReplace,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttfschemas := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tsrc.ProviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDataSources: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tjsonchanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalResourceChanges([]*plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{src}, tfschemas)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal resource changes: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(tfschemas)\n\t\t\tchange := structured.FromJsonChange(jsonchanges[0].Change, attribute_path.AlwaysMatcher())\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiff := diff{\n\t\t\t\tchange: jsonchanges[0],\n\t\t\t\tdiff:   differ.ComputeDiffForBlock(change, jsonschemas[jsonchanges[0].ProviderName].ResourceSchemas[jsonchanges[0].Type].Block),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDiff(renderer, diff, proposedChange)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(output, tc.ExpectedOutput); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong output\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", tc.ExpectedOutput, output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestOutputChanges(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.OutputChangeSrc\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"new output value\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  + foo = \"bar\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"removed output\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  - foo = \"bar\" -> null`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"single string change\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"alpha\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"beta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"delta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"epsilon\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"alpha\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"beta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"gamma\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"delta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"epsilon\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ foo = [\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n        \"beta\",\n      + \"gamma\",\n        \"delta\",\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n    ]`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"multiple outputs changed, one sensitive\": value) # forces replacement\n        id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with sensitive nested type attribute forcing replacement\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     cty.StringVal(\"not-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"top-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     cty.StringVal(\"not-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"new-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSingle,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_moved(t *testing.T) {\n\tprevRunAddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\tName: \"previous\",\n\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance)\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]testCase{\n\t\t\"moved and updated\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"boop\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  # (moved from test_instance.previous)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ bar = \"baz\" -> \"boop\"\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"moved without changes\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.previous has moved to test_instance.example\n    resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\ntype testCase struct {\n\tAction               plans.Action\n\tActionReason         plans.ResourceInstanceChangeActionReason\n\tModuleInst           addrs.ModuleInstance\n\tMode                 addrs.ResourceMode\n\tInstanceKey          addrs.InstanceKey\n\tDeposedKey           states.DeposedKey\n\tBefore               cty.Value\n\tBeforeSensitivePaths []cty.Path\n\tAfter                cty.Value\n\tAfterSensitivePaths  []cty.Path\n\tSchema               *configschema.Block\n\tRequiredReplace      cty.PathSet\n\tExpectedOutput       string\n\tPrevRunAddr          addrs.AbsResourceInstance\n}\n\nfunc runTestCases(t *testing.T, testCases map[string]testCase) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tty := tc.Schema.ImpliedType()\n\n\t\t\tbeforeVal := tc.Before\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase beforeVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !beforeVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterVal := tc.After\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase afterVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !afterVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\taddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\tMode: tc.Mode,\n\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"example\",\n\t\t\t}.Instance(tc.InstanceKey).Absolute(tc.ModuleInst)\n\n\t\t\tprevRunAddr := tc.PrevRunAddr\n\t\t\t// If no previous run address is given, reuse the current address\n\t\t\t// to make initialization easier\n\t\t\tif prevRunAddr.Resource.Resource.Type == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tprevRunAddr = addr\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tbeforeDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(beforeVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic before value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(afterVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic after value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsrc := &plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\tChangeSrc: plans.ChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:               tc.Action,\n\t\t\t\t\tBefore:               beforeDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: tc.BeforeSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfter:                afterDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths:  tc.AfterSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\n\t\t\t\tAddr:        addr,\n\t\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\t\tDeposedKey:  tc.DeposedKey,\n\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tProvider: addrs.NewDefaultProvider(\"test\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tModule:   addrs.RootModule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tActionReason:    tc.ActionReason,\n\t\t\t\tRequiredReplace: tc.RequiredReplace,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttfschemas := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tsrc.ProviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDataSources: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tjsonchanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalResourceChanges([]*plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{src}, tfschemas)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal resource changes: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(tfschemas)\n\t\t\tchange := structured.FromJsonChange(jsonchanges[0].Change, attribute_path.AlwaysMatcher())\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiff := diff{\n\t\t\t\tchange: jsonchanges[0],\n\t\t\t\tdiff:   differ.ComputeDiffForBlock(change, jsonschemas[jsonchanges[0].ProviderName].ResourceSchemas[jsonchanges[0].Type].Block),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDiff(renderer, diff, proposedChange)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(output, tc.ExpectedOutput); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong output\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", tc.ExpectedOutput, output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestOutputChanges(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.OutputChangeSrc\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"new output value\":  + foo = \"bar\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"removed output\":  ~ foo = [\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n        \"beta\",\n      + \"gamma\",\n        \"delta\",\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n    ]`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"multiple outputs changed, one sensitive\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"a\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(1),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(2),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"b\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"hunter2\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"correct-horse-battery-staple\"),\n\t\t\t\t\ttrue,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"c\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(false),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(true),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ a = 1 -> 2\n  ~ b = (sensitive value)\n  ~ c = false -> true`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tchanges := &plans.ChangesSrc{\n\t\t\t\tOutputs: tc.changes,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\toutputs, err := jsonplan.MarshalOutputChanges(changes)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal output changes\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiffs := precomputeDiffs(Plan{\n\t\t\t\tOutputChanges: outputs,\n\t\t\t}, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\toutput := renderHumanDiffOutputs(renderer, diffs.outputs)\n\t\t\tif output != tc.output {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Unexpected diff.\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\n\", output, tc.output)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNestedType: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ conn_info = { # forces replacement\n          ~ password = (sensitive value)\n            # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n        }\n        id        = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_moved(t *testing.T) {\n\tprevRunAddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\tName: \"previous\",\n\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance)\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]testCase{\n\t\t\"moved and {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.previous has moved to test_instance.example\n    resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\ntype testCase struct {\n\tAction               plans.Action\n\tActionReason         plans.ResourceInstanceChangeActionReason\n\tModuleInst           addrs.ModuleInstance\n\tMode                 addrs.ResourceMode\n\tInstanceKey          addrs.InstanceKey\n\tDeposedKey           states.DeposedKey\n\tBefore               cty.Value\n\tBeforeSensitivePaths []cty.Path\n\tAfter                cty.Value\n\tAfterSensitivePaths  []cty.Path\n\tSchema               *configschema.Block\n\tRequiredReplace      cty.PathSet\n\tExpectedOutput       string\n\tPrevRunAddr          addrs.AbsResourceInstance\n}\n\nfunc runTestCases(t *testing.T, testCases map[string]testCase) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tty := tc.Schema.ImpliedType()\n\n\t\t\tbeforeVal := tc.Before\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase beforeVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !beforeVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterVal := tc.After\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase afterVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !afterVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\taddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\tMode: tc.Mode,\n\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"example\",\n\t\t\t}.Instance(tc.InstanceKey).Absolute(tc.ModuleInst)\n\n\t\t\tprevRunAddr := tc.PrevRunAddr\n\t\t\t// If no previous run address is given, reuse the current address\n\t\t\t// to make initialization easier\n\t\t\tif prevRunAddr.Resource.Resource.Type == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tprevRunAddr = addr\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tbeforeDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(beforeVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic before value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(afterVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic after value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsrc := &plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\tChangeSrc: plans.ChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:               tc.Action,\n\t\t\t\t\tBefore:               beforeDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: tc.BeforeSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfter:                afterDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths:  tc.AfterSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\n\t\t\t\tAddr:        addr,\n\t\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\t\tDeposedKey:  tc.DeposedKey,\n\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tProvider: addrs.NewDefaultProvider(\"test\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tModule:   addrs.RootModule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tActionReason:    tc.ActionReason,\n\t\t\t\tRequiredReplace: tc.RequiredReplace,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttfschemas := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tsrc.ProviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDataSources: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tjsonchanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalResourceChanges([]*plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{src}, tfschemas)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal resource changes: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(tfschemas)\n\t\t\tchange := structured.FromJsonChange(jsonchanges[0].Change, attribute_path.AlwaysMatcher())\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiff := diff{\n\t\t\t\tchange: jsonchanges[0],\n\t\t\t\tdiff:   differ.ComputeDiffForBlock(change, jsonschemas[jsonchanges[0].ProviderName].ResourceSchemas[jsonchanges[0].Type].Block),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDiff(renderer, diff, proposedChange)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(output, tc.ExpectedOutput); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong output\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", tc.ExpectedOutput, output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestOutputChanges(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.OutputChangeSrc\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"new output value\":  ~ foo = [\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n        \"beta\",\n      + \"gamma\",\n        \"delta\",\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n    ]`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"multiple outputs changed, one sensitive\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"a\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(1),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(2),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"b\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"hunter2\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"correct-horse-battery-staple\"),\n\t\t\t\t\ttrue,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"c\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(false),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(true),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ a = 1 -> 2\n  ~ b = (sensitive value)\n  ~ c = false -> true`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tchanges := changes\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiffs := precomputeDiffs(Plan{\n\t\t\t\tOutputChanges: outputs,\n\t\t\t}, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\toutput := renderHumanDiffOutputs(renderer, diffs.outputs)\n\t\t\tif output != tc.output {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Unexpected diff.\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\n\", output, tc.output)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc
